title: Verify PATH is correctly added to .zshrc using >> operator
description: Test that PATH addition uses append (>>) instead of overwrite (>) to preserve existing .zshrc content
preconditions: ~/.zshrc file exists with some existing content

steps.description: 3. Verify original content still exists in ~/.zshrc
4. Verify PATH export line was appended

expected_result: Original .zshrc content is preserved and PATH export is added without overwriting
